titleStmt.title: SII 34.42: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 42. Tiruppanandāḷ, Kumbakonam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the north wall of the first prākāra of the Arjunajaṭēśvara temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Immaḍi •••, s/o Dēvarāya-Mahārāya II, Śaka 1369, Kshaya = 1446-47.

Damaged and incomplete. Gift of 1/2 vēli of land to the temple of Tiruppanandāḷ in Chēññalūr-Tiruppanandāḷ in Maṇṇi-nāḍu in Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu on the north bank. The donor, a resident of Iḍavai alias Pāṇḍiyaṉai-veṉkaṇḍa-chōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Maṇṇi-nāḍu, purchased the land from the sabhā of Māṇikkap-padukkaḍai in Iḍavai-paṟṟu for conducting the festival of Mārgaḻi-Tiruvādirai in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī maṉmakāmaṇṭalEcuraṉ śrīvīrappiṟatāpa kecavEṭṭai kaṇṭaruḷiya tEvarāya makārāya kumāra yimmaṭi
tuvirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam 1000 3 100 6 10 9 mēl cellā niṉṟa kṣaya caṅvaṟcarattu taṉucu nāyaṟṟu
ṟuṇaiyum peṟṟa miṟukacīrḻattu nāḷ vaṭakarai virutarāca payaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇi nāṭṭu ceññalūr
tiruppaṉaintāḷt tiruppaṉaintāḷuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku Iṉṉāṭṭu Iṭavai Āṉa pāṇṭiyaṉai veṉkaṇṭa cōḻaccatup
tōṭṭaṅ kōmapuṟattu peruma mālaiyiṭṭa perumāḷēṉ taṉma taṉam Āka kalveṭṭikkuṭuttapa
tiruvātirait tirunāḷukku mutal ḷum tiruveḻiccit tirunāḷum Eṉṉuṭaiya Upaiyam Āka naṭakka
ntra Aṅka Araṅkapōkam Ammutupaṭikku viṭa Iṉṉāyāṉār tēvatāṉam Iṭavaippaṟṟu māṇikkappatukkaṭaiyil capaiyār ta
viṭṭa nilattil Eṉṉuṭaiya viḻukkāṭu nilattil Uḻaviṉāl mēṟkaṭaiya cētta rūpāy (1/2) Iṉṉilam Araiyum tirumārkaḻi tiruvātirai
tiruveḻicci tirunāḷukku cēttapaṭiālē Inta tirunāḷ cantirātittavaraiyum naṭatta caṟuvamāṉiyaāka cēttapaṭi
nilam Araiyum caṟuvamāṉiyam Āka cantirātittavaraiyum Aṉupōvittukkoṇṭu Inta tirunāḷ Eṉṉu
ṭaiya Upaiyaāka tāḻvuaṟa naṭattikkoḷḷavum I ma Aṟakkaṭal paṭṭaṉ veṉṟu mālaiyiṭṭaperumāḷ Eḻuttu I
vai vināyakapaṭṭar Āccāri Eḻuttu Ivai Aḻakiya maṇavāḷar Eḻuttu Ivai Appiṉai Eḻuttu Āṟṟūr paḷḷikoṇṭāṉ paṭṭar mutaliya nāyanār Eḻuttu
Eḻuttu Ivai Appaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivarkaḷ colla Intakāṇi vilaippiṟamāṇam paṇṇiṉamaikku naṉnallūr Upāttiyār kaṇṭi Ūruṭaiyār
Aṟivaṉ nacciṉārkkiṉiyan tiruppaṉaintāḷ tē paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu paramēcurapaṭṭaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ śrī parāntakaṉ Eḻuttu cēkapaṭṭaṉ Ippaṭi Uṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ tirunāvuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ kāṭṭūr varatarācapaṭṭaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ perumpa
Uṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ tirunāvuṭaiyaṉ paṭṭaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ kāṭṭūr varatarāca paṭṭaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ perupē
Aṟi vaṉ Otumukkil ppaṭi Aṟivaṉ teyvanākapaṭṭaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ Aḻakiyacōḻappiramārāyaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ Āṉa
Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ cīrāmapaṭṭaṉ Āccāri Ippaṭiaṟivaṉ vaṭukakkuṭi śrīnaraciṅkan paṭṭaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ vaṭṭamaṇi cūriya paṭṭaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ Aruḷāḷa paṭṭaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ tāṉatarap paṭṭan Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ
Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ naraciṅkūr varatarācapaṭṭaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ tirumikaiccūr tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ puṅkanūr kiḻavaṉ cempiyaṉ kōṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ kaṇaṅkuṭai
Iḷaiya kaṇṇaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ vaṭukakkuṭaiyāṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ kāñcirampāṭi Uṭaiyāṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ kurukularāyar Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ teṉṉavataraiyaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ tiruviṉār
ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ Emmaṇṭalaṅkoṇṭa vēḷāṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ ciruppara cakkaraṅkayaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ cavuṇṭappak kāliṅkarāyaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ vaippūruṭaiyāṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ kuṭikoṇ
Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ cētarāyaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ civantaperumāḷ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ cīykāḻi Āṉanta kūtta mutaliyār Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ kaṉaka cupāpati paṭṭaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ tāṭāḷaṉ kōyilli
Digital edition of SII 34.42 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
